content_cadence.progress_updates: twice per week while active beta work is shipping
content_cadence.patch_release_updates: immediately after release metadata or changelog changes reserve or promote a patch
content_cadence.upcoming_features: weekly, but only for roadmap items already present in repo truth sources
content_cadence.implementation_snapshots: after user-visible or operator-visible release changes land

posting_rules: Do not claim a feature is live unless it appears in currentRelease or the public changelog.
Do not claim a patch is shipped until release metadata promotes it and deployment evidence exists.
Treat beta-launch and reports/final as evidence sources, not as customer-facing copy to paste verbatim.
Keep every post within the configured character limit and attach the supporting source paths.
Require human approval before anything is posted to a real X account.
LinkedIn publishing uses scripts/publish-linkedin-posts.mjs — same approval workflow as X.
